channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: La crise de la RAM va-t-elle retarder la sortie de la PS6 et de la Xbox Next ? Le patron de Take-Two (GTA 6) répond
item.description: Alors que la pénurie de mémoire RAM impacte tous les appareils électroniques, certains s'inquiètent du devenir des prochaines consoles de Sony et Microsoft. À raison ou à tort ?

item.title: Samsung TQ55S95F : le prix de l’un des meilleurs TV OLED pour les films et le gaming est en chute libre
item.description: Pic de luminosité record, traitement antireflet bluffant, meilleures technologies gaming présentes... Le TV OLED Samsung TQ55S95F n'a pas du tout volé son excellente note de 9/10. Actuellement, Ubaldi le propose à 1 444 euros au lieu de 2 390 euros.

item.title: 900 km d’autonomie : voici les secrets de Xiaomi pour faire mieux que la Tesla Model 3 avec sa nouvelle SU7 électrique
item.description: La nouvelle Xiaomi SU7 électrique restylée frappe fort, avec de nouvelles batteries, un nouveau moteur. De quoi annoncer plus de 900 km d'autonomie. On décortique ce qu'il y a sous le capot.

item.title: Crimson Desert developer's shares tank despite the game's strong Metacritic score
item.description: Pearl Abyss reportedly saw a huge drop in its share price following the release of Crimson Desert reviews.

item.title: Rivian sacrifices 2027 profit goal to push deeper into autonomy
item.description: Rivian admitted in a regulatory filing that it is delaying its goal of reaching "positive EBITDA" next year because of how much it is spending on developing self-driving technology.

item.title: PlayStation Network : Sony va abandonner le nom PSN mais pas ses fonctions
item.description: Sony va supprimer une marque bien connue des joueurs : le PSN, alias PlayStation Network, tirera sa révérence en septembre. Qu'on se rassure, il n'y aura aucun changement dans les fonctions du service.

item.title: Le mystérieux modèle IA de Xiaomi égale les géants américains pour un prix dérisoire
item.description: L'apparition d'une puissante intergilligence artificielle inconnue au bataillon a semé la zizanie du côté de la Silicon Valley. Le mystère vient de prendre fin en révélant une offensive spectaculaire de Xiaomi, dont le nouveau modèle rivalise avec les leaders américains pour une fraction du prix.

item.title: HP’s Intel Core Ultra 7 265 mini PC workstation for developers and professionals is 50% off right now - a half price Best Buy Tech Fest steal
item.description: HP’s Z2 Mini G1i workstation delivers solid performance for creative tasks, everyday productivity, and multitasking, and it’s half price right now.

item.title: What Will ‘The Scream’ Look Like in 300 Years? This Tool Simulates Its Future
item.description: The tool remains an interesting proof of concept, but it could expand into something genuinely useful for researchers and conservators.

item.title: Tesla’s Full Self-Driving is on the cusp of a recall
item.description: Tesla's Full Self-Driving system is facing an expanded investigation by the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration over its safety during poor road visibility conditions, as previously reported by Reuters. Tesla vehicles with Full Self-Driving (FSD) have a "degradation detection" system that's supposed to alert drivers to take over when the vehicle's cameras can't see the […]...

item.title: Casio’s new $600 calculator is a work of art
item.description: Can a basic calculator with an old-school segmented LCD screen be beautiful? Casio's response to that question is its new S100X featuring a traditional Japanese hand-painted finish using sap from the lacquer tree, giving the calculator a glossy black finish with warm red highlights around the edges. It somehow looks even more luxurious than if […]

item.title: Alexa+ launches in the UK
item.description: Amazon’s next-generation smart assistant has entered its Early Access program in the UK, marking Alexa+’s European debut following rollouts in the US, Canada and Mexico. Starting March 19, invitations to start using the smarter, more conversational Alexa will be sent out to "hundreds of thousands" of willing participants, Amazon said in a press release, adding that Alexa is the most popular voice assistant in the UK. As well as its more natural communication, agentic capabilities, contextual awareness and ability to remember previous conversations across devices, Amazon that users across the p...

item.title: A new iPhone hacking tool puts some iOS 18 users at risk
item.description: Google and cybersecurity companies Lookout and iVerify have detailed a new hacking technique that potentially puts a significant portion of iPhone users in danger, just by visiting the wrong web page. The hack is called "DarkSword" and since it specifically targets several different versions of iOS 18, it could affect "close to a quarter of iPhones," Wired writes.DarkSword is a "fileless" hack that leverages a collection of exploits to access sensitive data when an iPhone visits an infected website. Rather than install spyware that hangs around on a user's phone after messages and other privat...

item.title: Signal’s Creator Is Helping Encrypt Meta AI
item.description: Moxie Marlinspike says the technology powering his encrypted AI chatbot, Confer, will be integrated into Meta AI. The move could help protect the AI conversations of millions of people.

item.title: Great News: ‘Sonic 4’ Has Chaos Emeralds and Matt Berry
item.description: Start your rampant speculation now as to who Berry could be uniquely enunciating as in the next 'Sonic' movie.

item.title: Paramount’s $110 billion Warner Bros. gamble
item.description: Today on Decoder, let’s talk about the big Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery merger. This deal could reshape all of media and entertainment if and when it closes. That’s still an if, which we’ll come back to — right now Paramount head David Ellison is very much acting like he’s over the finish line after outbidding Netflix, […]

item.title: K2 to launch its first high-powered satellite for space compute
item.description: K2's Gravitas is an ambitious project that aims to demonstrate the tech needed to build data centers in space.

item.title: Tools for founders to navigate and move past conflict
item.description: Founders can create frameworks for working through conflict and change when the team is just two or three people, and if done correctly, it can scale with the company.

item.title: Anori, Alphabet’s new X spinout, is tackling one of the world’s most expensive bureaucratic nightmares
item.description: Anori aims to shrink down the pre-development process by getting all parties, including the city, on to a unified platform from the start so that compliance conflicts are surfaced in weeks instead of months or years.

item.title: ‘This is what Val wanted’ — Val Kilmer’s AI movie return has his family’s blessing, but it feels deeply unsettling
item.description: First Line Films has shared its first look at the AI-generated Val Kilmer character for the movie As Deep As The Grave.

item.title: Maryam Banikarim on career chaos, C-suite pressure, and betting on yourself
item.description: The former CMO of Univision reflects on navigating setbacks, redefining identity beyond job titles, and how her upbringing during Iran’s revolution shapes her view of resilience and leadership. Career disruption is accelerating across the economy—and few people have navigated it more boldly than Maryam Banikarim. The former CMO of Univision, Gannett, and Hyatt, and host of The Messy Parts podcast, Banikarim shares hard-won wisdom about C-suite politics, and what it means to ultimately bet on yourself. Growing up in Iran during the time of revolution, Banikarim offers a unique perspective on th...

item.title: Google Maps veut faciliter le partage de position avec un nouveau bouton
item.description: Le partage de sa position via Maps pourrait devenir plus clair. Actuellement, il est un peu trop caché pour qu'on pense à l'utiliser.

item.title: Voici la « nouvelle » Xiaomi SU7 électrique : 900 km d’autonomie et un prix intéressant pour faire de l’ombre à la Tesla Model 3
item.description: Après une première génération couronnée de succès, Xiaomi met à jour sa première voiture électrique, la SU7. La berline gagne en confort, en autonomie et en sécurité pour une très légère augmentation de ses prix. Elle pourrait bien arriver en Europe en 2027.

item.title: Seulement 400 € pour un smartphone premium Samsung, c’est l’offre du jour chez Fnac et Darty
item.description: Le Samsung Galaxy S24 FE Entreprise Edition est similaire au modèle classique, avec quelques fonctions logicielles supplémentaires. On le trouve aujourd'hui à 402 euros au lieu de 749 euros au lancement.

item.title: La dernière mise à jour de la Switch 2 bloque des cartes microSD Express
item.description: Mauvaise surprise pour plusieurs joueurs Switch 2. Après l'installation de la dernière mise à jour de la console, des utilisateurs de la console ont constaté à leur grand désarroi que leurs précieuses (et coûteuses) cartes microSD Express ne fonctionnaient plus correctement. Un sérieux problème quand le stockage de la Switch 2 montre rapidement ses limites....

item.title: Hubble Was Watching This Comet When the Coolest Thing Happened
item.description: C/2025 K1 (ATLAS) was on its way out of the solar system when it did the fateful thing that many comets do.

item.title: Alibaba stock is falling as it spends heavily on AI. CEO Eddie Wu insists the tech will be its main growth driver
item.description: A significant downturn in profit is one of multiple disappointments in the Chinese technology company’s latest financial results. Alibaba’s net income fell 66% year-over-year (YOY) for 2025’s fourth quarter while it invested heavily in AI.

item.title: macOS 26.4 bientôt de sortie : quelles nouveautés pour votre Mac ?
item.description: Apple a publié la « Release Candidate » de macOS 26.4, signe annonciateur d'un déploiement imminent pour cette nouvelle version du système d'exploitation des Mac. Voici les principales nouveautés attendues sur les ordinateurs Apple.

item.title: Will Trump deploy U.S. troops to Iran to seize uranium?
item.description: Experts say such a mission would be far more complicated than other operations, such as the capture of Nicolás Maduro or the killing of Osama bin Laden. President Donald Trump is facing perhaps the most daunting question of the war with Iran, one that could define his time in office: Will he put U.S. troops on the ground in Iran to secure some 970 pounds of enriched uranium that Tehran could potentially use to build nuclear weapons?Trump has offered shifting reasons for launching the war, but he has been consistent in articulating that a primary objective in joining Israel in the military acti...

item.title: Consumer-focused privacy company Cloaked raises $375M as it expands to enterprise
item.description: Cloaked's latest round is a mix of equity and growth funding.

item.title: Trailers for trailers? Movie studios in the TikTok era are competing for 1 second of your precious attention
item.description: This week, trailers for ‘Dune: Part Three’ and ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ came with their own pre-trailer hype. Blink and you might have missed it. Trailers of two of Hollywood’s most anticipated upcoming movies came out this week. Warner Bros. Discovery’s Dune: Part Three and Marvel Studios’s Spider-Man: Brand New Day premiered a day apart.

item.title: Poco X8 Pro : noté 8/10, ce nouveau monstre d’autonomie signé Xiaomi, coûte déjà 35 % de moins
item.description: Après le X7 Pro, Xiaomi revient avec le Poco X8 Pro, un smartphone gamer qui mise sur un processeur véloce et une grosse batterie, pour assurer lors des sessions de jeu. De base à 403 euros, il peut vous revenir à seulement 259 euros.

item.title: Tubi and TikTok are partnering to produce long form series
item.description: Soon, some of TikTok's biggest personalities are going to be launching new streaming series on Tubi. Today, Tubi and TikTok announced that they are working together to launch a new Creatorverse Incubator that will help content creators produce long form original series for the Fox-owned streaming service. Once selected for the program, a group of […]...

item.title: Nothing Phone 4a Pro review: A midrange phone that rivals the Pixel 10a
item.description:
Nothing takes a different tack with its phone series. For the second time in a row, its midrange entry-level A-series smartphones debuted ahead of its next flagship device. The company has even warned that we won’t be getting the Nothing Phone 4 until next year. Until then, the Phone 4a Pro is here to make an impact, with a more restrained design, a less obtrusive camera bump and specs that beat out last year’s Nothing Phone 3 — all for $499. In 2026, Nothing is truly aiming to dethrone the Pixel 10a.
Hardware
Mat Smith for Engadget
It’s a new look. That’s often the case with Nothin...

item.title: Finalement, Meta ne fermera pas le métavers des casques Quest
item.description: Le métavers perd très littéralement une dimension. Meta va bientôt fermer le cercueil d'Horizon Worlds, la plateforme de réalité virtuelle des casques Quest. Elle ne disparait pas complètement, puisqu'elle a transité sur les smartphones. Mais tout de même, c'est un aveu d'échec cinglant pour le principal promoteur de cette technologie.

item.title: Alexa+ promises an AI layer over everything — I’m not sure anyone asked for that
item.description: Alexa+ makes voice assistants smarter and more natural than ever — but it may be solving a problem most people don’t actually have.

item.title: Nothing Phone 4A Pro review: That flagship feeling
item.description: CEO Carl Pei says Nothing won't release a flagship phone this year. So instead we have the 4A Pro, a $499 phone that looks and feels higher-end than last year's flagship Phone 3, helped in large part by a new metal design. Compare the Phone 4A Pro to its immediate rivals, the Pixel 10A and […]

item.title: Adobe’s AI image generator can now be trained on your own art
item.description: Adobe is launching customizable AI image generators that can mimic specific artistic styles and character designs. The Firefly Custom Models are available in public beta starting today, allowing creators and brands to train a model on their own assets to ensure generated images follow a consistent aesthetic for characters, illustrations, and photography. The tool aims […]...

item.title: Tubi joins forces with popular TikTokers to create original streaming content
item.description: Tubi launched its “Creatorverse Incubator” to help TikTokers create original shows exclusively for the streaming service.

item.title: Arc expands into electric commercial and defense boats with $50M raise
item.description: The Los Angeles startup raised $50 million from Eclipse, a16z, Menlo Ventures, and others as it seeks to expand beyond sport boats.

item.title: The new MacBook Air 15 M5 is great, but it's hard to justify when the still-excellent M4 model is $300 off
item.description: The 15-inch M4 MacBook Air (2025) just hit a record low of $1,099 at Amazon.

item.title: ‘Just a joy to use’ — I reviewed the new Nothing Phone (4a) Pro and its striking design, giant blazing screen, and useful Glyph Matrix reminded me that phones can actually be fun
item.description: With its sleek design, solid performance, and playful features, the Nothing Phone (4a) Pro has won me over from my conservative old handset.

item.title: Marina Sirtis Has a Very Real Reason Why She Thinks ‘Star Trek: Legacy’ Will Never Happen
item.description: Plus, Netflix finds the rest of its Mystery Inc. team for the 'Scooby-Doo' live-action series.

item.title: J’ai testé cet OVNI, le Nothing Phone (4a) Pro : un petit écran au dos et un zoom bluffant pour son prix
item.description: Voici notre test complet du Nothing Phone (4a) Pro : un smartphone qui mise sur un bon rapport qualité-prix avec, en sus, un look hors norme.

item.title: I can finally make the UI of my Series X bright pink after the new Xbox dashboard update
item.description: A new Xbox update is rolling out in the coming weeks with some big upgrades.
